quality_highlights: safe-outputs-pull-requests.md: exemplary reference doc with inline YAML examples for every field, :::note callouts, and accurate bundle/patch transport description
compile_dependabot_validation_test.go: clean test structure; underlying error messages in compile_validation.go are precise and actionable
smoke-multi-pr.md: professional, direct status messages with no theatrical language

single_file_improvements.issue: run-success uses 🧪 (same as workflow footer identity emoji) instead of ✅, removing the quick visual status signal. Change 🧪 to ✅ on line 77.

Appendix A worked example silently applies the §3.5 cache_read deduction (net input = 1000-400=600 tokens) without documenting it; naïve application gives 0.0066825 not 0.0054825. Add step-by-step breakdown calling out §3.5.
